title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The green, foam-flecked waters of Maelstrom Bay stretch out in all directions.  Gentle swells roll in rhythmically from the great western sea.  The mainland is marked by the line of a tall cliff.  The cliff dips low to the north, revealing the spire of a tower.  Sea birds soar high overhead, scanning the waters for food.
paths: Obvious paths: north, east, southeast, south, southwest, west, northwest, down

wayto.11440: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'west' else move 'swim west' end; waitrt?
